keyword.text: Weekly fitness competitions with your friends — powered by Apple Watch.

Updates hourly. Your row stays pinned. Everyone sees who's gaining and who's slipping.

keyword.text: Most apps pick one. We let you pick the scoring rule that fits your group.

A real ending screen — not a system alert. Share the win, then demand a rematch.
